multi_group:
WITH group_means AS (
  SELECT "region", "sex", AVG("bmi") AS grp_avg
  FROM patients
  WHERE "bmi" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "region", "sex"
),
global_mean AS (
  SELECT AVG("bmi") AS all_avg FROM patients WHERE "bmi" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  t.*,
  COALESCE(t."bmi", g.grp_avg, (SELECT all_avg FROM global_mean)) AS "bmi_imputed"
FROM patients t
LEFT JOIN group_means g ON t."region" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM g."region" AND t."sex" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM g."sex"
single_group:
WITH group_means AS (
  SELECT "region", AVG("score") AS grp_avg
  FROM patients
  WHERE "score" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "region"
),
global_mean AS (
  SELECT AVG("score") AS all_avg FROM patients WHERE "score" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  t.*,
  COALESCE(t."score", g.grp_avg, (SELECT all_avg FROM global_mean)) AS "score_imputed"
FROM patients t
LEFT JOIN group_means g ON t."region" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM g."region"
